__fixture__.name: rollback_preview_lockfile_checkpoint
__fixture__.scenario: Rollback preview packet that materialises a restore_lockfile_to_checkpoint plan. The packet pins the lockfile checkpoint the rollback will restore to and resolves to review_admitted_apply_pending so the user can confirm the rollback. Validates rollback-preview-packet invariants: action class is restore_lockfile_to_checkpoint, rollback_posture_class is rollback_via_lockfile_checkpoint, and the checkpoint ref is non-null.
acceptance_bullets: 1: rollback truth before apply via materialised preview packet

decision_note: Rollback preview: lockfile would be restored to the prior checkpoint; the user can confirm the rollback.
registry_disclosure: Rollback operates on local lockfile state; no registry read is required.
script_risk_disclosure: Rollback does not run install scripts.

lockfile_impact_envelope.lockfile_impact_disclosure: Five lockfile entries that the latest install added would be removed by the rollback.

transitive_impact_envelope.transitive_impact_disclosure: Four transitive entries would be removed by the rollback.

rollback_posture_disclosure: Rollback restores the lockfile to checkpoint_e7 and re-resolves no remote queries.
mirror_or_offline_state_disclosure: Online; rollback operated on local state only.
